case_title: WIEGANDT, PETER VON vs. RICHARDS, GLEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WIEGANDT, PETER VON AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDS, GLEN CLARK-RICHARDS, NANCY R. HERTZ RENT A CAR HERTZ CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-26-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-06-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-26-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, COURT IMPOSE SANCTIONS OF $100 PAYABLE NOT LATER THAN 10/15/96; 2ND OSC TO PLTF. FOR PLTF. TO SHOW CAUSE AS TO WHY FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES & CCP 575.2, FACT FINDING INQUIRY AS TO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THIS FAILURES, IF NO GOOD CAUSE, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
